name: StepUp
description: A fitness and exercise app that helps users set and achieve physical activity goals, with features to track progress and provide motivation. It offers customizable workout plans and social features to connect with friends.
features: Customizable workout plans based on fitness goals and level
Social features to connect with friends and join fitness challenges
Reward system with badges and leaderboard rankings
target_audience: Fitness enthusiasts, athletes, and individuals looking to improve their physical health
